query:
-- 1. platform_products: add pvp_price, net_price, expires_at, updated_at
ALTER TABLE platform_products
  ADD COLUMN pvp_price DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN net_price DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- 2. platform_settlements: add invoice_ref, coupon_ids, net_total, paid_at; rename settled_at to emitted_at
ALTER TABLE platform_settlements
  ADD COLUMN invoice_ref VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN coupon_ids JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN net_total DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN paid_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN settled_at emitted_at TIMESTAMP NULL;

-- 3. platform_settlements: update status enum to pendiente/emitida/pagada (migrate existing data first)
UPDATE platform_settlements SET status = 'pendiente' WHERE status = 'pendiente_cobro';
UPDATE platform_settlements SET status = 'pagada' WHERE status = 'cobrado';
ALTER TABLE platform_settlements
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pendiente','emitida','pagada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendiente';

-- 4. coupon_redemptions: add platformProductId and settlementId
ALTER TABLE coupon_redemptions
  ADD COLUMN platformProductId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN settlementId INT NULL;

-- 2. platform_settlements: add invoice_ref, coupon_ids, net_total, paid_at; rename settled_at to emitted_at
ALTER TABLE platform_settlements

  ADD COLUMN coupon_ids JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN net_total DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN paid_at TIMESTAMP NULL,

-- 3. platform_settlements: update status enum to pendiente/emitida/pagada (migrate existing data first)
UPDATE platform_settlements SET status = 'pendiente' WHERE status = 'pendiente_cobro';
UPDATE platform_settlements SET status = 'pagada' WHERE status = 'cobrado';
ALTER TABLE platform_settlements
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pendiente','emitida','pagada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendiente';

-- 4. coupon_redemptions: add platformProductId and settlementId
ALTER TABLE coupon_redemptions

  ADD COLUMN settlementId INT NULL;
